item.title: App Target Entry Point and Xcode Build Setup
item.intent: The repo needs a buildable app target so developers can run on device without manual setup beyond opening Xcode
item.description: Add EasyMarkdownApp/ directory with @main entry point (thin wrapper delegating to AppShell), Info.plist with UTI declarations for .md/.markdown, multi-window scene manifest for iPad Stage Manager, and document type registration. Add BUILDING.md with step-by-step Xcode setup guide. No .xcodeproj checked in (SPM-first per A-001).
acceptanceCriteria: EasyMarkdownApp.swift contains @main struct delegating to AppShell from EMApp
Info.plist declares UTImportedTypeDeclarations (not Exported) for net.daringfireball.markdown
Info.plist does NOT reference a SceneDelegate class (pure SwiftUI lifecycle via WindowGroup)
BUILDING.md documents step-by-step Xcode target creation, signing, and first-build validation
swift build still passes (EasyMarkdownApp/ is not part of any SPM target)
